domain:
In the context of a theater organization, various plays are performed in one or more theaters, each identified by its own location, for example "The Northwest Theater". A play may have multiple scheduled sessions, and each session occurs on a scheduled date. Plays are identified by a unique name and is either a musical or an opera. Furthermore, each play may take place during the day or at night.

Each play is written by one or more authors, who are uniquely identified by name. Plays involve participants each also identified by name, and the same participant may act in multiple plays. For each play session, the starting time and an ending time is recorded, and participants can act in one or more sessions. Both authors and participant can be the same person, who may write a play and participate in its performance.

questions.question:
What is the minimum cardinality of Play in the relationship with Author?

For example:
1. Minimum cardinality of zero, an author can exist without any associated play.
2. Minimum cardinality of one, an author must have at least one associated play.

Which option is better for you?
questions.option_1: Option 1: Zero as minimum cardinality, Author can exist without Play.
questions.option_2: Option 2: One as minimum cardinality, Author must have at least one Play.
questions.selected: Option 1: Zero as minimum cardinality, Author can exist without Play.

questions.question:
What is the maximum cardinality of Play in the relationship with Author?

For example:
1. Maximum cardinality of one, an author is associated with exactly one play.
2. Maximum cardinality of many, an author can be associated with multiple plays.

Which option is better for you?
questions.option_1: Option 1: One as maximun cardinality, each author links to one play.
questions.option_2: Option 2: Many as maximun cardinality, each author can link to multiple plays.
questions.selected: Option 2: Many as maximun cardinality, each author can link to multiple plays.

questions.question:
We know that each theater has a name. When we think about name, is it just a simple piece of information, like a line of text? 
Or is name made up of different parts that might be important?
For example:
1. For each name, the detail information is saved separately, so users can filter theater by detail.
2. The name is a single piece of text. This works well when we just need to show the name.

Which option is better for you?
questions.option_1: Option 1: The Name is a separate class with its own attributes.
questions.option_2: Option 2: Model name as a simple representation in Theater.
questions.selected: Option 1: We need the name details separately.

questions.question:
Should the relationship between Theater and Session be modeled as a composition or as an association?

For example:
1. Use composition, Session would depend on Theater for its existence.
2. Use association, Session could exist independently of Theater, and can also be linked to multiple theaters.

Which option is better for you?
questions.option_1: Option 1: Composition is needed because class Session depends on Theater.
questions.option_2: Option 2: Association is sufficient because class Session exists independently of Theater.
questions.selected: Option 1: Composition is needed because class Session depends on Theater.

questions.question:
Should the relationship between Theater and Author be modeled as a composition or as an association?

For example:
1. Use composition, Author would depend on Theater for its existence.
2. Use association, Author could exist independently of Theater, and can also be linked to multiple theaters.

Which option is better for you?
questions.option_1: Option 1: Composition is needed because class Author depends on Theater.
questions.option_2: Option 2: Association is sufficient because class Author exists independently of Theater.
questions.selected: Option 2: Association is sufficient because class Author exists independently of Theater.

questions.question:
Should Session be modeled as an association class linking Theater and Play, or as a regular class with two separate associations?

For example:
1. Regular class: Session is a class that has links to Theater and Play. In this case multiple sessions can exist for every Theater and Play.
2. Association class: Session exists only as part of the relationship between Theater and Play. A session cannot exist without the link between Theater and Play.

Which option is better for you?
questions.option_1: Option 1: Association class, Session as association class linking Theater and Play.
questions.option_2: Option 2: Regular class, Session as separate class with two associations.
questions.selected: Option 1: Association class, Session as association class linking Theater and Play.
